creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
(In reply to eusteuc from comment #3)
You are correct, it's likely that the config file contains errors, and Marko will need to fix that.

However, with the current state of the port it's actually quite hard to get any information from Forgejo (or Gitea) about the reason the daemon doesn't start. For example, to run forgejo doctor check, you will need to set at least three environment variables to the correct value. The update to the ports addresses that.
